name: specialists-shopify
description: Domain plugin for Shopify store repos (e.g. smartwatchbanden): the subagents Liam, Sandra, and Steven, plus the domain skill start-task (new branch + preview theme). Deliberately NOT repo-neutral — only a Shopify repo enables this plugin. The governance layer (CLAUDE.md + .claude/manuals/*) and the shared core (plugin 'specialists') stay separate.
